display_name: Meta-analysis refresh — Phase 1 (paired with External Audit #2)

case_study_exemption_reason: Phase 1 of the meta-analysis program IS itself a set of meta-analysis docs (L0/L1/L2); the deliverables are the analysis, so no separate case study is warranted.

implementation.note: All 7 deliverables shipped in PR #445 (squash merge ab4eebe, 34 files). Pre-squash branch commits per Tier 2.2 log: 422d7d1 + d7920c1 + 0a1032b + 1891a1c5 + 0a6cbb7.

complete.note: Phase 1 met all 7 spec success criteria (design §success-criteria), shipped 2026-05-22 — 17 days ahead of the 2026-06-08 target. Verified 2026-05-29: 7/7 deliverable files present with full content; L2 File A == staged Audit #2 bundle copy (identical); 38 claims (≥ 30 required); README index +3 rows; integrity-check 0 findings on the new docs. state.json reconciled 2026-05-29 (drift: shipped 2026-05-22 but never advanced past implementation).

cache_hits.note: Closure sentinel (same pattern as audit-1-corrections, created 2026-05-22). Original 2026-05-22 session reads of this feature's spec/plan/docs were recorded by Mechanism C but attributed to active_feature='ucc-passkey-auth-security-hardening' — the .claude/active-feature pointer was never switched to meta-analysis-refresh-phase-1 during its lifecycle, so auto-population never targeted this feature. count:0 is accurate (zero reads attributed here); this entry marks the feature complete vs the empty-array drift state without fabricating cache hits.
